response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across diverse stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) and demonstrates craftsmanship principles like TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging systems, A/B testing infrastructure, or growth/measurement systems — all core to this Principal IC6 role. Title is 'Senior' / 'Staff' rather than Principal, and there's limited evidence of architecting cross-team systemic platforms at the scale this role demands.
strengths: Broad polyglot experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) matching language requirements
High-throughput, low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP req/sec)
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, open-source contributions, workshops, and mentoring
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or A/B testing infrastructure
Lacks evidence of Principal-level cross-team architectural leadership or multi-workstream initiatives
No clear track record with telemetry/metrics platforms or statistical/experimental analysis

key_factors.factor: Polyglot engineering breadth and 13+ years of experience
Limited Principal-level cross-team systemic leadership signal
